content.full_text:
California
Fair Political
Practices Commission
May 13,
1993
C.
R. Hall
Woridlnvest Limited
56 Russell Square
London WC1B 4HP
Re:
Your Request for Advice
Our File No.
A—93—l58
Dear Mr. Hall:
You have requested advice concerning the conflict of interest
disclosure provision of the Political Reform Act (the “Act”) •l/
OUESTION
Is Woridlnvest Limited required to complete Statement of
Economic Interests Form 730 for the Kern County Employees’
Retirement Association?
CONCLUS ION
Woridlnvest Limited is not required to complete Form 730.
However, the employees of Woridlnvest Limited who perform work on
behalf of Kern County Employees’ Retirement Association are
designated employees and must complete Form 730.
FACTS
Worldlnvest Limited provides investment management services
on behalf of the Kern County Employees’ Retirement Associations
ANALYSIS
The Act requires each California state and local governmental
agency to adopt a conflict of interest code.
In the conflict of
interest code,
each agency must designate those positions that
involve the making or participation in the making of decisions
which may foreseeably have a material financial effect on a.
financial interest of the designated employee holding the
position.
(Section 87302.)
The term “designated employee” and
1/ Government Code Section 81000—91015.
All statutory references
are to the Government Code unless otherwise indicated.
Commission
regulations appear at
2 California Code of Regulations Section
18000, et g.
All references to regulations are to Title 2,
Division
6 of the California Code of Regulations.
428 J Street, Suite 800
•
P.O. Box 807 •
Sacramento, CA
95804-0807
•
(916) 322-5660


C.
R. Hall
A—93—158
page
2
“public official” are defined in the Act to include any consultant
to an agency who makes or participates in agency decisions.
(Sections 82019 and 82048.)
Regulation 18700(a) (2)
defines “consultant” as any natural
person who provides, under contract,
information,
advice,
recommendation or counsel to a state or local governmental agency.
Since Kern County Employees’ Retirement Association’s
conflict of interest code designates “all natural persons who
advise the Board of Retirement in the capacity of investment
counsel,” the employees of Worldlnvest who provide this service
are designated employees and must complete Form 730.
If you have any questions or need further assistance, please
contact me at
(916)
322—5662.
Sincerely,
Jeff Marschner
General Counsel
c_)
By:
Colleen McGee
Political Reform Consultant
Technical Assistance Division

embedding.qa_text:
QUESTION: Is Woridlnvest Limited required to complete Statement of
Economic Interests Form 730 for the Kern County Employees’
Retirement Association?

CONCLUSION: Woridlnvest Limited is not required to complete Form 730.
However, the employees of Woridlnvest Limited who perform work on
behalf of Kern County Employees’ Retirement Association are
designated employees and must complete Form 730.

CONCLUS ION Woridlnvest Limited is not required to complete Form 730. However, the employees of Woridlnvest Limited who perform work on behalf of Kern County Employees’ Retirement Association are designated employees and must complete Form 730.
